prompt: Order these exploration milestones from earliest to latest

events.title: Marco Polo travels to Asia
events.fact: 1271 — Venetian merchant travels the Silk Road

events.title: Columbus reaches Americas
events.fact: 1492 — sailing under Spain, lands in Bahamas

events.title: Magellan circumnavigation
events.fact: 1519 — fleet sets sail to circle the globe

events.title: Lewis and Clark expedition
events.fact: 1804 — US military expedition maps Western territory

events.title: Amundsen reaches South Pole
events.fact: 1911 — Norwegian explorer beats Robert Falcon Scott
